name: databind-core

metadata.name: databind.core
metadata.summary: Databind is a library inspired by jackson-databind to de-/serialize Python dataclasses. Compatible with Python 3.8 and newer. Deprecated, use `databind` package.

documentation:
Deprecated since v4.5.0. This is a proxy for depending on [`databind`](https://pypi.org/project/databind/). Do not
depend on this package directly anymore.

modules.name: _databind_core_proxy
documentation: Need at least one Python file to publish a package.
